title: Coffee Gapples
description: Do you like coffee? Well then umm.. this texture pack changes your golden apples to coffee! (only a bit cursed)
body:
![Coffee on display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cZjMRrky/images/5823c5d4b07d05cc09d193f228eb0a83f6c305f0.png)\
A pack that changes golden apples to coffee... only mildly cursed..
